case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS TAYLOR, CLARK

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, CLARK
